final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a "经典简约科技风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple Human Interface Guidelines minimalist system design, Bauhaus functional grid heritage, 2010s–2020s dark-mode SaaS dashboard visual language (Stripe / Linear / Vercel); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multi-panel layout showing all component types — Dashboard (web), mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls — arranged in a layered, hierarchy-rich composition
Subject: must include:
  - Web Dashboard panel with data visualizations
  - Mobile interface screen
  - Card components (multiple variants)
  - Button components (multiple states)
  - UI controls (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep dark or near-black tech backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-tech atmosphere with strong depth and layer contrast — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech palette with vivid accent highlights (electric blue, cyan, or similar) against dark neutrals — exact hues are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of glass-morphism, subtle gradients, or layered translucency to reinforce depth — exact material execution is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must show clear visual hierarchy across all component types; all components must read as a cohesive system
Avoid: flat, low-contrast, or overly colorful toy-style UI; skeuomorphic heavy textures
